steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
The line segment totals 113 cm. One part is 47 cm, and the other two parts have equal length. Let x represent the length of each equal part. Since all three parts sum to the total:
$$47 + x + x = 113$$

steps.title: Solve for the equal parts
steps.content:
Simplify the left side:
$$47 + 2x = 113$$
Subtract 47 from both sides:
$$2x = 66$$
Divide both sides by 2:
$$x = 33$$
The length of one of the two equal parts is 33 cm.
